channel.title: Is there a way to handle content individually?
channel.description: Hello, I have a question. I want to do the individual management of the content that I subtract from Wordpress from a post, but I need to create TABS, how can I do it?

item.title: Is there a way to handle content individually?
item.dc:creator: bc.ayrton
item.description:
Hello, I have a question. I want to do the individual management of the content that I subtract from Wordpress from a post, but I need to create TABS, how can I do it?

Read full topic
item.source: Is there a way to handle content individually?
